productDisplayName: Gas Men Passtime Grey Casual Shoes
description: Have fun choosing from our collection of casual shoes from gas. Comfy and stylish, this pair is worth the add in your wardrobe as it'll look great when teamed with jeans and a tee.UpperBlended fabric upper with rubber at the on the top, toe region, midfoot and heel for structural comfortCentral lace up system with contrast laces for snug Fit and comfortCushioned sock-liner for in-step cushioningRubber toe box and heel for protectionMidsoleEva midsole for responsive cushioning and shock absorptionCushioned foot-bed for all-day comfortBrand badge on back heel and lateral side for styleOutsoleTPU outsole with textured grooves and scooped waffle pattern along the sides for maximum grip and traction Branding on the outsole that doubles up as suction points shoe careRemove dust and dirt with dry clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
